full_text:
Wang Guang (Gongyuan) 王廣 (公淵)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Guang (王廣), styledGongyuan (公淵). Warned his father against plotting against Sima Yi but was killed when his father’s plot was exposed. Wang Guang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Wang Guang lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
